section_name: Time of Operation; Display of Flag, Cloth, or Strobe Light
chapter_title: Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) A vehicle subject to this subchapter may be operated only during daytime.

(b) In this section, “daytime” has the meaning assigned by Section 541.401 (Miscellaneous Terms) .

(c) A red flag or cloth not less than 12 inches square or a strobe light must be displayed at the rear of the load carried on the vehicle so that the light or the entire area of the flag or cloth is visible to the driver of a vehicle approaching from the rear.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 622. Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 622.042 — Time of Operation; Display of Flag, Cloth, or Strobe Light

(a) A vehicle subject to this subchapter may be operated only during daytime.

(b) In this section, “daytime” has the meaning assigned by Section 541.401 (Miscellaneous Terms) .

(c) A red flag or cloth not less than 12 inches square or a strobe light must be displayed at the rear of the load carried on the vehicle so that the light or the entire area of the flag or cloth is visible to the driver of a vehicle approaching from the rear.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.134(b), eff. Sept. 1, 1997; Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 749, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: In this section, “daytime” has the meaning assigned by Section 541.401 (Miscellaneous Terms) .

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: A red flag or cloth not less than 12 inches square or a strobe light must be displayed at the rear of the load carried on the vehicle so that the light or the entire area of the flag or cloth is visible to the driver of a vehicle approaching from the rear.
